recommendations.title: Only You
recommendations.overview: A madly-in-love young couple's relationship begins to suffer when they struggle to conceive a child.

recommendations.title: Jodhaa Akbar
recommendations.overview: A sixteenth century love story about a marriage of alliance that gave birth to true love between a Mughal emperor and a Rajput princess.

recommendations.title: Booksmart
recommendations.overview: Two academic teenage superstars realize, on the eve of their high school graduation, that they should have worked less and played more. Determined to never fall short of their peers, the girls set out on a mission to cram four years of fun into one n

recommendations.title: Trust
recommendations.overview: Set in the glamour of the New York and Paris art scenes, gallery owner Brooke Gatwick and her newscaster husband Owen Shore, face temptation, jealousy, twists and mystery when two seductive newcomers enter their lives.

recommendations.title: Unfaithful
recommendations.overview: A New York suburban couple's marriage goes dangerously awry when the wife indulges in an adulterous fling.

recommendations.title: Zoo
recommendations.overview: A couple trying to save their marriage during a zombie apocalypse.

recommendations.title: Still Out of My League
recommendations.overview: After breaking up with her dreamboat, Marta finds love with an artist. But life throws a few twists into the mix for the ailing woman and her friends.

recommendations.title: Chemical Hearts
recommendations.overview: When a hopelessly romantic high school senior falls for a mysterious new classmate, it sets them both on an unexpected journey that teaches them about love, loss, and most importantly themselves.

recommendations.title: The Drama
recommendations.overview: A happily engaged couple is put to the test when an unexpected turn sends their wedding week off the rails.

recommendations.title: Transamerica
recommendations.overview: A transgender woman takes an unexpected journey when she learns that she had a son, now a teenage runaway hustling on the streets of New York.
